subject: fix(tags): suggestions and autocomplete not appearing in edit modal
body:
Two bugs caused the tag input to appear completely dead:

1. ML confidence threshold was 0.5 — zero-shot classification on short
   transaction descriptions (e.g. "Pick n Pay") routinely scores 0.2-0.4
   for correct labels, so every suggestion was silently filtered out.
   Lowered to 0.15 and added debug logging when all suggestions are
   below threshold.

2. Autocomplete only searched tagCache, which is empty for demo
   workspaces and first sessions (tagCache is only populated on save).
   Now merges tagCache with a knownTags prop containing all tags from
   existing transactions in the workspace.

Tags: tags, ml, ux, autocomplete, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dashboard-polish
Semver: patch
